ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "alpha_2_code" TEXT /* ISO Alpha-2 code */,
  "alpha_3_code" TEXT /* ISO Alpha-3 code */,
  "numeric_code" TEXT /* ISO Numeric code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Average latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Average longitude of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "independence_date" TEXT /* Date of independence */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code associated with the region */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region within the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the demographic record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the country */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy of the country */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate of the country */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "is_official" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the language is an official language */,
  "percentage_speakers" REAL /* Percentage of speakers of the language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Code of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the currency record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate_usd" REAL /* Exchange rate to USD */,
  "date_of_exchange" TEXT /* Date of exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currencies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the geographical feature */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the geographical feature (e.g., mountain, river) */,
  "feature_length_km" REAL /* Length of the geographical feature in kilometers */,
  "feature_elevation_m" INTEGER /* Elevation of the geographical feature in meters */,
  "feature_area_km2" REAL /* Area of the geographical feature in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_features_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treaties" (
  "treaty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the treaty record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "treaty_name" TEXT /* Name of the treaty */,
  "date_signed" TEXT /* Date the treaty was signed */,
  "treaty_type" TEXT /* Type of the treaty (e.g., bilateral, multilateral) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the treaty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treaty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treaties_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "organization_code" TEXT /* Code of the organization */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of the organization (e.g., international, regional) */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the organization was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_organizations" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organization */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the country joined the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_regions" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "region_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the country in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country in that year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country in that year */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country in that year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country in that year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country in that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the country data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "article_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
